description: This video explains the risks associated with using public WiFi, including man-in-the-middle attacks and cookie theft. It provides tips on how to protect yourself while using public networks.
topic_summary: Public WiFi poses significant security risks, including man-in-the-middle attacks [t=16:88] and cookie theft [t=140:47]. Users are advised to verify network authenticity and utilize VPNs for sensitive activities [t=212:5].
